name: Nine Lives Auction
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop and auction house in Phoenix, AZ that buys, sells, and trades gold, silver, firearms, jewelry, and collectibles with over 40 years of combined industry experience.
description_long:
Nine Lives Auction & Pawn is a family-owned and operated pawn shop and auction house located in Phoenix, Arizona at 2510 East Bell Road. The business combines traditional pawn services with an auction component, offering a hybrid model designed to provide customers with multiple pathways to buy, sell, or trade valuables. The company emphasizes its independent status as a "Mom & Pop" small business, positioning itself as an alternative to larger corporate pawn chains in the local market.

The shop specializes in purchasing precious metals (gold, silver, and platinum), jewelry, firearms, tools, musical equipment, antiques, and collectible items. They offer pawn loans secured by collateral, direct purchases of valuables, and auction services through their online platform featuring categories like firearms and comics. The company advertises competitive pricing and claims to pay "top dollar" for items, with emphasis on fair and transparent appraisals. They also operate an online auction system with current and upcoming auctions listed on their website.

Nine Lives differentiates itself through personal customer service, emphasis on relationship-building, low-interest loan offerings, and a stated commitment to a "stress-free process." The business highlights its family ownership, local roots, and extensive combined experience in pawn and auction industries. Their online presence includes active auction listings, customer reviews on Google, and direct contact channels for appraisals and inquiries.

As a pawn shop, the business serves customers needing immediate cash against collateral, those liquidating valuable items, and auction buyers seeking specific collectibles. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are collateral-dependent, interest rates and terms vary, and customers risk losing items if loans aren't repaid. The auction component adds complexity and may involve longer timelines compared to direct purchases.
address: 2510 E Bell Rd Ste. 1, Phoenix, AZ 85032

company_info.headquarters: 2510 E Bell Rd Ste. 1, Phoenix, AZ 85032

pros: Family-owned independent operator, not a corporate chain
Combines pawn loans with auction services for flexibility in buying and selling
Explicitly states low-interest loans compared to industry standard
Online auction platform with documented listings and bidding
Over 40 years of combined expertise in pawn and auction industries
Accepts diverse item categories including firearms, precious metals, tools, and musical equipment
Multiple contact methods: phone, email, and in-person consultations available
cons: Limited hours: closed Sundays and weekdays after 5pm may inconvenience working customers
Website contains grammatical errors ('equiptment' instead of 'equipment'), suggesting limited professional polish
No transparent pricing information, interest rates, or loan terms displayed on website
Vague 'low-interest' claims without specific rates or comparison data provided
No information about loan approval process, documentation requirements, or repayment terms
best_for: People needing immediate cash against valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, firearms)
Individuals liquidating precious metals, antiques, or collectibles outside traditional retail channels
Collectors bidding on firearms, comics, or specialty items through their online auction platform
Customers preferring local, family-owned businesses over corporate pawn chains
diagnosis: Best for Phoenix-area customers needing immediate cash against valuable personal items or those liquidating precious metals, collectibles, and specialty goods through a local, independent operator rather than a corporate pawn chain. Primary consideration: pawn loans are collateral-dependent with variable terms; customers must verify specific interest rates, repayment terms, and forfeit policies directly with the shop, as these critical details are not disclosed on their website.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal valuables with stated low interest rates
Direct purchase of gold and silver at competitive rates
Musical equipment buying and pawn loans
Antique and collectible appraisals and purchases
Online auction platform with active listings
Auction bidding services for firearms and comics
